ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the country is located */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "geosize_group" TEXT /* Geographical size classification (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country in USD */,
  "climate_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate zone of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "independence_date" TEXT /* Date of independence of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government of the country */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_climate_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_zone_id") REFERENCES climate_zones ("climate_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_zones" (
  "climate_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate zone */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the climate zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate zone */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range of the climate zone in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation_range" TEXT /* Precipitation range of the climate zone in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, collaborator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken during access (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country in the given year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the population */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in the given year in USD */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the climate data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the country in the given year in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation of the country in the given year in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
